name: todo-app
description: Todo Master - A TickTick-inspired todo application

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix web/frontend && npm install --prefix web/backend
scripts.install:clean: rm -rf web/frontend/node_modules web/backend/node_modules web/frontend/package-lock.json web/backend/package-lock.json && npm run install:all
scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
